name: math-teacher-assistant
_versionNote: VERIFY THESE AT MVP START — LTS schedules shift. Node 24 active LTS as of April 2026.

scripts.test:lesson-plan: node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runTestsByPath src/lessonPlan/LessonPlanGenerator.test.ts src/lessonPlan/curriculumContext.test.ts src/lessonPlan/generatedArtifacts.test.ts src/lessonPlan/renderLessonPlan.test.ts src/lessonPlan/validateInvariants.test.ts src/lessonPlan/worksheetPolicy.test.ts src/lessonPlan/worksheetVerification.test.ts src/app/api/lesson-plan/generate/route.test.ts src/exam/backends.test.ts src/exam/exportDocx.test.ts --coverage=false
scripts.test:rubrics: node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runTestsByPath src/examRubric/renderRubric.test.ts src/examRubric/loadRubrics.test.ts src/examRubric/buildRubricFromExam.test.ts src/examRubric/saveRubric.test.ts src/examRubric/aiRubricGenerator.test.ts src/app/api/rubrics/route.test.ts --coverage=false
scripts.test:artifacts: node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runTestsByPath src/artifacts/serverStore.test.ts src/questionBank/serverStore.test.ts src/questionBank/seedIngest.test.ts src/exam/questionBankSeed.test.ts src/app/api/question-bank/route.test.ts --coverage=false
scripts.test:signoff: npm run type-check && npm run test:lesson-plan && npm run test:progress && npm run test:rubrics && npm run test:artifacts && npm run test:evals
